creator: szymluk86@gmail.com
text:
I use packages. I have got installed XScreenSaver-5.29_4. When I start graphical environment, I have message "XScreenSaver-5.29 is too old! Please upgrade".

I see, in ports exists the same version of XScreenSaver as packages repo.
On Jamie Zawinski's website is 5.33 version.

Can packages maintainers update XScreenSaver?

Best regards.
